title: KrystalCraft
description: Make your mining more complex with new machines and minerals.
body:
# KrystalCraft
Visit my discord server: https://discord.com/invite/vWBP4P4Yd8

## Description
This mod adds a more realistic way of processing ores, this makes obtaining resources a slightly slower process. The processes depend on whether it is a gem or a metal.

### Items
With this mod you will have a lot of new ores, with each of them you will be able to make new armor, weapons and tools with different stats.

### Feel free to use this mod on your modpack
